notes: MOON's six-face arcana die. CLEAR SIGNAL is the highest success. NOISE is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The pattern resolves — back into pattern-lessness. Advance two.
Success ★. You see what it says — and don't write it down. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The static held briefly. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 MOONDRIFT).
Partial. The marquee flickered. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 MOONDRIFT).
Failure. The pattern grabbed you. +1 MOONDRIFT.
Wild. ★ if the bell is rung this turn. Otherwise: failure, and the popper cycles empty.
